skills.title: Documentation Pack With Clean Return
skills.summary: Build a reusable documentation or research pack with stable published outputs and final verification.
compositionHints: Start with research, then publish stable docs and a final verification marker.
Use modular chunks when the documentation pack spans multiple subtopics.
simpleExamples: Create a reusable knowledge pack from my notes and official docs.

defaultModules.title: Research the topic
defaultModules.summary: Collect the most useful knowledge and turn it into reusable notes.

defaultModules.title: Publish the documentation pack
defaultModules.summary: Turn the research into stable final documentation files.

publishedOutputs: stable docs files per slug or requested filename

skills.title: Three.js Vanilla Documentation Pack (Validated)
skills.summary: Generate a validated Three.js vanilla context pack with clean published docs and a verify marker.
simpleExamples: Build a clean context pack about Three.js vanilla for game development.

defaultModules.title: Research Three.js
defaultModules.summary: Collect the most useful Three.js vanilla references for the requested scope.

defaultModules.title: Publish framework docs
defaultModules.summary: Write the stable docs pack and verification marker.

skills.title: App Builder With Clean Return
skills.summary: Turn a product brief into a runnable app or feature with a clean final workspace handoff.
simpleExamples: I want an app built from a short product brief.

defaultModules.title: Plan the app slice
defaultModules.summary: Turn the brief into a focused implementation slice.

defaultModules.title: Implement the app
defaultModules.summary: Build the requested app or feature in the workspace.

skills.title: Game Dev Managed Flow With Clean Return
skills.summary: Drive game-development work from source docs through roadmap, slices, implementation loops, and publish/verify.
simpleExamples: I want a dev cycle for a Vampire Survivors style game from my gameplay analysis and web research.

defaultModules.title: Analyze the existing game data
defaultModules.summary: Extract the strongest gameplay, progression, and retention insights from the provided analyses.

defaultModules.title: Deepen with game research
defaultModules.summary: Research unresolved design questions and comparable systems from the web.

defaultModules.title: Create the roadmap and slices
defaultModules.summary: Turn the analysis and research into a clear roadmap and implementation slices.

defaultModules.title: Implement the strongest slice
defaultModules.summary: Build or update the most valuable game slice in the workspace.

skills.title: Analysis Pipeline Modular Architect
skills.summary: Turn existing analyses into a modular multi-agent workflow that deepens, synthesizes, and generates new data.
simpleExamples: I already have analysis data and I want a workflow that deepens it with web research and creates new structured outputs.
Create a multi-agent pipeline from my existing analyses.

defaultModules.title: Normalize the source analyses
defaultModules.summary: Read the existing analyses and turn them into a clean working baseline.

defaultModules.title: Deepen the weak areas
defaultModules.summary: Use web research to fill the gaps and deepen the uncertain areas.

defaultModules.title: Synthesize the signal
defaultModules.summary: Merge the analysis baseline and the research findings into a stronger synthesis.

defaultModules.title: Generate the new dataset
defaultModules.summary: Create the new data products, manifests, or briefs requested by the user.

skills.title: Workflow Generator And Publisher
skills.summary: Generate, lint, publish, and verify a reusable workflow artifact.
simpleExamples: Generate and publish a reusable workflow template from my requirements.

defaultModules.title: Assemble the workflow
defaultModules.summary: Produce the draft workflow artifact from the requested goal.

defaultModules.title: Publish the workflow
defaultModules.summary: Lint, publish, and verify the final workflow artifact.

skills.title: Workflow API Operator
skills.summary: Operator runbook for creating sessions, configuring workspaces, generating workflows, running them, and validating published outputs via the API.

skills.title: Hello World Workflow
skills.summary: Create a minimal single-node workflow that proves the end-to-end flow with one stable output file.
simpleExamples: Create a hello world workflow I can inspect and run.

defaultModules.title: Write the greeting
defaultModules.summary: Create one simple artifact that proves the workflow executed.

skills.title: REST API Pipeline
skills.summary: Coordinate API requests, transform responses, and publish a stable result bundle with explicit validation.

defaultModules.title: Call the APIs
defaultModules.summary: Run the required HTTP calls and capture raw responses.

defaultModules.title: Transform the data
defaultModules.summary: Normalize the responses into the requested result contract.

skills.title: Scheduled Report Generator
skills.summary: Collect recurring inputs, generate a report, and publish a stable summary package on a repeated cadence.

defaultModules.title: Collect the source data
defaultModules.summary: Gather the inputs needed for the current reporting window.

defaultModules.title: Publish the report
defaultModules.summary: Create the final markdown and structured report outputs.

skills.title: File Organizer
skills.summary: Sort, classify, and publish a stable manifest for a messy directory of files.

defaultModules.title: Inventory the files
defaultModules.summary: List and classify the input files before any reorganization.

defaultModules.title: Publish the organization plan
defaultModules.summary: Produce the stable file plan, summary, and verification marker.

skills.title: Notification Dispatcher
skills.summary: Fan out one event or briefing across multiple channels while keeping a stable dispatch manifest and verification output.

defaultModules.title: Prepare per-channel messages
defaultModules.summary: Adapt the source brief for each channel and publish the final dispatch plan.

defaultModules.title: Verify the dispatch package
defaultModules.summary: Confirm the final plan is complete and publish a stable summary.
